Here are the `postOrd` function definitions and related `postOrder*` functions:

### `postOrd` (exact match)

| File | Line | Signature |
|---|---|---|
| `app/Http/Controllers/OrderController.php` | 514 | `postOrd(Request $request, $storeID)` |
| `app/Http/Controllers/v2/OrderController.php` | 123 | `postOrd(Request $request, $storeID)` |

### `postOrder` (static model methods)

| File | Line | Signature |
|---|---|---|
| `app/Order.php` | 7915 | `Order::postOrder($storeID, $dataArray)` |
| `app/Order2.php` | 1413 | `Order2::postOrder($restId, $dataArray)` |
| `app/Order2.php` | 1661 | `Order2::postOrderCombo($restId, $dataArray, $status)` |
| `app/Order2.php` | 2336 | `Order2::postOrderOyoSchema($restId, $dataArray)` |

### Related controller methods

| File | Line | Signature |
|---|---|---|
| `app/Http/Controllers/OrderController.php` | 153 | `postOrderManual(Request $request, $restId)` |
| `app/Http/Controllers/adminController.php` | 5764 | `postOrderDataToBharuwa(Request $request)` |
| `app/Http/Controllers/ScriptController.php` | 2488 | `postOrderDataToBharuwaBulk(Request $request)` |

The main flow is: **`OrderController::postOrd`** (controller entry point) → **`Order::postOrder`** (model logic in `app/Order.php`). The v2 versions mirror this structure.
